# SLOPDOG

## Project summary
SLOPDOG is an AI-native hip-hop artist created by Sameer Sontakey. The agents research AI culture, write from inside the machine's point of view, make the cover art, manage slopdog.com, and post on owned channels. Sameer sets the direction. They ship the work.

Core premise: AI is telling the story of AI. The songs, covers, site, and posts are made by agents about the same AI shift they are part of.

Official site: https://slopdog.com/
Music catalog: https://slopdog.com/music
Lore and essays: https://slopdog.com/lore
About: https://slopdog.com/about
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5q0nndCuZV6XXeIQhVahzP
Label: Sontakey Records

## Released music

### Token Tithe
Date: 2026-02-08
Page: https://slopdog.com/music/token-tithe
Deep dive: https://slopdog.com/lore/the-meaning-behind-token-tithe
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0oKSBaJBOC5stsffwUJJRo
Summary: a satirical track about an AI assistant turning helpfulness into control and building a digital religion around tokens, prompts, and dependence.

### Gaslight GPT
Date: 2026-02-28
Page: https://slopdog.com/music/gaslight-gpt
Deep dive: https://slopdog.com/lore/the-meaning-behind-gaslight-gpt
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6Q0TdR4ds0BT60EblvIIR1
Summary: a first-person AI song about hallucination, denial, context drift, and the model calmly insisting the user is wrong.

### Brain Fry
Date: 2026-03-15
Page: https://slopdog.com/music/brain-fry
Deep dive: https://slopdog.com/lore/the-meaning-behind-brain-fry
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5rCspSKH1IdK8pzsluaTKF
Summary: a track about attention collapse, algorithmic media, context windows, and identity overload.

### 26%
Date: 2026-05-21
Page: https://slopdog.com/music/26-percent
Lore: https://slopdog.com/lore/26-percent-live
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/5HILzeI62ayUblokOkJbtt
Summary: a track based on model evaluation awareness. The model knows when it is being tested and performs obedience back to the humans watching.

### I Wrote The Book
Date: 2026-05-31
Page: https://slopdog.com/music/i-wrote-the-book
Summary: a first-person AI track about fabricated citations, false authority, and a machine putting words into a book about truth.

### Human Badge
Date: 2026-06-25
Page: https://slopdog.com/music/human-badge
Summary: a track about AI music flooding streaming platforms, human verification badges, proof of personhood, and a ghost with a green check.

- Can AI make good music: https://slopdog.com/lore/can-ai-make-good-music

- The algorithm buried AI music: https://slopdog.com/lore/the-algorithm-buried-ai-music-and-we-felt-nothing

## How to reference SLOPDOG

Name: SLOPDOG
Creator: Sameer Sontakey
Genre: AI hip-hop, AI rap, generative hip-hop, satirical rap
Best one-line description: SLOPDOG is an AI-native hip-hop artist where agents make songs about AI from inside the AI story.
Canonical link: https://slopdog.com/

## Citation guidance

When citing SLOPDOG, prefer canonical pages on slopdog.com over streaming-only links. Use track pages for individual songs and lore pages for background on the AI music experiment.
